teaching.concept: A bullet list groups related items so each one is easy to scan.
teaching.howTo: Start each item on a new line with a hyphen and a space.

candidates.title: Bullet list
candidates.prompt: Write a three-item bullet list in Markdown.
candidates.target:
- Pens
- Markers
- Scissors

matchChecks.feedback: Add at least three bullet items, with words after each marker.

editorialChecks.review: Keep these items together in one bullet list.

hints: Each item starts on its own line.
Type a hyphen, one space, then the item.
Example: `- Apples`
